headline: Globant S.A. (GLOB) A Small Cap Value Stock Capitalizing on Soaring IT Spending
summary: Globant S.A. (NYSE: GLOB) is one of the best small-cap value stocks to buy. On April 9, analysts at Wedbush initiated coverage of Globant S.A. (NYSE: GLOB) with an Outperform rating and a $61 price target. According to the research firm, IT services continue to play an integral part in cloud computing. The research firm […]
